articles.description: TORONTO — A Canadian union is asking the federal government and competition watchdog to scrutinize a takeover of one of the world’s biggest video game makers by Saudi Arabia’s sovereign wealth fund and a private equity firm owned by U.S. President Donald Trump’s son-in-law. articles.title: Teen charged with murder after three found dead in Brockville home
articles.description: Police in the eastern Ontario city of Brockville say a teen faces first-degree murder charges after three people were found dead inside a home. Officers say they responded earlier Thursday to a 911 call at a home on Cartier Court in the border city’s north end and deemed the deaths suspicious.
